value.found_quote: Its context management system centers on three pillars: Skills for reusable capability, Knowledge Items for persistent memory, and Artifacts for transparent documentation of its work.
value.rationale: The page describes Google Antigravity's context management system, explicitly stating it centers on three pillars: Skills for reusable capability, Knowledge Items for persistent memory, and Artifacts. This directly matches the claim. The page presents Antigravity as a currently available agent-first IDE built by Google DeepMind.
